name: Caribou Wellness and Recreation Center
description: Caribou Wellness and Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Caribou, ME. There are 5 hard courts. 1 is indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Fake Fields
description: This court does not exist and is exists only for testing. It's not a pickleball court. Please do not come here expecting to play pickleball.

name: Fort Fairfield Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Fort Fairfield Community Center in Fort Fairfield, ME! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Mantle Lake Park
description: Mantle Lake Park is a place to play pickleball in Presque Isle, ME. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Presque Isle community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Presque Isle community Center in Presque Isle, ME! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: UMFK Sports Center
description: UMFK Sports Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fort Kent, ME. There are 4 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Van Buren Community Center
description:
One inside court available by reservations only.
Outside courts also by reservations also.
